meta.name: Max Vilchevskiy

meta.summary: 12+ years of iOS development, including 4+ years in Senior iOS roles at PASHA Holding (Birmarket — shared marketplace/loyalty iOS SDK across 3 host apps; Loyalty squad; technical lead on Premium Subscription) and GlobalLogic (watchOS voice AI R&D project). Strong in UIKit/SwiftUI, SPM, and shared SDK/platform delivery.
meta.summaryShort: 12+ years of iOS development, including 4+ years in Senior roles. At PASHA Holding — Birmarket marketplace & loyalty: contributed to shared marketplace/loyalty iOS SDK across 3 host apps; technical lead on Premium Subscription module extraction; high crash-free sessions during staged rollouts. UIKit/SwiftUI · SPM · SDK delivery.
meta.landingAbout: Senior iOS Engineer with 12+ years of experience building consumer and fintech products. Recently worked on watchOS voice AI R&D at GlobalLogic. Previously developed marketplace and loyalty features at PASHA Holding, including a shared iOS SDK used across multiple apps, and earlier contributed to the Drinkit mobile app. Experienced in taking features from architecture to production, collaborating with cross-functional teams, and delivering scalable iOS solutions.
meta.skillsLine: Swift · SwiftUI · UIKit · SPM · XCTest · Swift Testing · WebSockets · Apple Pay · Firebase Remote Config · TestFlight
meta.languagesLine: English B1 · Ukrainian fluent · Russian native
meta.syncRule: Edit this file first, then update all surfaces in the same session: index-short.html, cv.html, experience.html, projects.html, index.html, career/linkedin-profile.md, career/djinni-profile.md, vil4max/README.md.

highlights: Contributed to shared marketplace/loyalty iOS SDK across 3 production host apps
Technical lead on Premium Subscription — extraction into a dedicated SDK module; App Store release
High crash-free sessions during staged rollouts and Firebase Remote Config experiments
Unit test coverage for critical business modules (XCTest · Swift Testing)

education.displayFull: Donetsk State University of Management · Donetsk, Ukraine — Bachelor's degree, Production sector management

roles.title: Senior iOS Engineer
roles.context: R&D prototype with 2 iOS engineers, Flutter, designers, BAs, and an external AI agent team.
bullets: Prototyped a voice-driven AI assistant on Apple Watch with a live backend over WebSockets and WatchConnectivity.
Built an on-device intent parser so AI commands update screens, navigation, and forms in real time.
Connected server-side intents to watchOS flows so users could complete tasks hands-free.
Shipped internal TestFlight builds; designed flows within watchOS constraints (connectivity, background execution, audio sessions).

roles.title: Senior iOS Engineer
roles.project: Birmarket — online marketplace & loyalty; Loyalty squad; shared iOS SDK in host apps (Birmarket, Birbank, M10)
roles.context: Loyalty squad (~5 developers) within ~20-person Birmarket product org (Marketplace squad ~10–15).
bullets: Contributed to shared marketplace/loyalty iOS SDK used in 3 production host apps, enabling parallel delivery across multiple squads.
Technical lead on Premium Subscription — requirements, implementation, localization, and App Store release (cashback/bonus logic); extracted Premium into a dedicated SDK module.
Maintained high crash-free sessions during staged rollouts and Firebase Remote Config experiments.
Delivered new product screens in SwiftUI while keeping legacy UIKit modules stable.
